items.title: RE: https://ruby.social/@willhbr/115564828622296517[1]
items.content:
Neat enhancement for ECR that allows hot reloading of static strings in the template at runtime 🤯

Changes to the Crystal code still require rebuilding, but this reduces the feedback loop for little changes such as adding a class in an HTML template.

items.title: We're reaching for the stars! 🚀✨
items.content: We're reaching for the stars! 🚀✨Just as 1.18 is released, over 20k users have starred the Crystal repo on GitHub 🌟
